Home / Compare / Wawee Coffee
commercial arabica northern-thai café-chain Chiang Mai

Wawee Coffee

วาวี คอฟฟี่

4.1
★ ★ ★ ★ ☆
560 reviews
Origin Chiang Mai / Northern Thailand
Roast Levels light medium dark
Price Range ฿120–200 / 200g
Founded 1998
Formats ground, whole bean, drip bag

Born in Chiang Mai, Wawee Coffee has grown into one of northern Thailand's beloved café chains, using arabica from highland communities near Chiang Mai. Their retail ground coffee carries the fresh, approachable character of northern Thai coffee culture.

Official Website ↗

Flavor Profile

Bright and food-friendly. Light-to-medium roast highlights sweet almond, mild caramel, and gentle citrus notes. Works beautifully as black coffee or with milk.

Tasting Notes

almond caramel mild citrus clean body

Flavor Breakdown

Body
3/5
Acidity
3/5
Sweetness
3/5
Bitterness
2/5
Aroma
4/5
